questions.question: Define the term 'stack' and provide a visual representation of a stack.
Explain the difference between 'Last In First Out' (LIFO) and 'First In First Out' (FIFO) stacks. Provide an example to illustrate each.

Implement a stack using an array in a programming language of your choice. Ensure the implementation includes the following operations: push, pop, peek, isEmpty, and isFull. Provide a sample program to demonstrate the usage of your stack implementation.
